column8: Family meetup. In the video, filmed in an unspecified rural location, it is possible to recognize Enrico Grammaroli and Salvatore Cuccureddu.

Family scenes from the Fiumicino house of Giorgio Grammaroli and from the beach of Fiumicino. It is possible to recognize Giorgio, Claudio, Marina and Simonetta Grammaroli. There are several other unrecognized people between relatives and neighbors
